description_long: This is a vintage portable radio receiver with a rectangular black body, featuring a prominent metal handle on top for easy carrying. The front panel displays a large frequency indicator with multiple bands, several rotary knobs for tuning and volume control, and a speaker grille with three circular speaker areas. On the back, there are various ports, switches, and a battery compartment, as well as a retractable metal antenna extending from the top. The sides are mostly plain, with one side showing a large tuning knob. The surface shows signs of wear and scuffing, suggesting frequent use in urban environments.
description: A black, vintage portable radio receiver with a metal handle, retractable antenna, multiple knobs, and a large frequency display on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing a large round tuning knob and the edge of the handle and antenna.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the battery compartment, ports, switches, and the back of the handle and antenna.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mostly plain with the handle and antenna visible.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the frequency display, multiple control knobs, and the speaker grille.
